text.title: Benefits Realization Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from `01-core-rules.xml`. Every leaf is a `conclusion` element referencing a rule id; this ensures the tree stays in lock-step with the rule set.

decision-tree.root-question: Did the business case promise quantitative benefits with a named owner?

conclusion.verdict: Track qualitatively or escalate to portfolio for owner assignment
Capture baseline before go-live or mark unmeasurable

branch.when: quantitative_with_owner == true AND baseline_pre_golive == true AND curve_present == false

conclusion.verdict: Author realisation curve with 5 measurement points

branch.when: quantitative_with_owner == true AND baseline_pre_golive == true AND curve_present == true

example.trace: quantitative_with_owner=true → baseline_pre_golive=true → curve_present=true → M3 measurement → RAG=YELLOW.
